examples: A "subprime borrower" is somebody who has a poor credit history or some other indication that would suggest that they might not be able to repay the mortgage.
The household sector is not a net new borrower.
The business sector is not a net new borrower.
Under this plan, a borrower can consolidate his loans after graduation to achieve a fixed rate.
It has nothing to do with whether this or that borrower makes its payments.
